subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Lord God! The vicissitudes of this earthly life have taken the path to nothingness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده پاک جان حضرت یزدان نوابهای عالم راه عدم گرفتند
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
